hero.heading: Sabor Auténtico on Division Street
hero.subheading: Salvadoran pupusas, Mexican favorites, and the kind of home-cooked Latin food that brings the whole neighborhood together. 251 five-star reviews in Cypress Park.

about.heading: The Corner That Feeds the Block
paragraphs: La Esquina Restaurant has been the heart of Division Street for years — a family-run kitchen serving authentic Salvadoran and Mexican dishes that taste exactly like they should. From our hand-pressed pupusas to our slow-cooked stews, everything is made from scratch with recipes that go back generations.

With 251 reviews and a 4.3-star rating, we've built our reputation the old-fashioned way: one plate at a time. Our regulars come for the pupusas, stay for the tamales, and always leave with a full stomach and a smile.
Open 9 AM to 7 PM, seven days a week. Come hungry.

services.title: Pupusas
services.description: Hand-pressed and griddled to perfection — stuffed with cheese, beans, chicharrón, loroco, or revueltas. Served with curtido and salsa roja.

services.title: Mexican Classics
services.description: Tacos, burritos, enchiladas, quesadillas, and tortas made fresh with your choice of meat and house salsas.

services.title: Salvadoran Specialties
services.description: Yuca frita, tamales de elote, plátanos fritos, sopa de res, and weekend specials that sell out early.

services.title: Breakfast & Drinks
services.description: Desayunos típicos, huevos con frijoles, fresh horchata, tamarindo, and café de olla to start your day.

reviews.name: Carmen L.
reviews.text: The best pupusas in LA. They're thick, perfectly crispy, and the curtido is fresh. My family has been coming here for years.

reviews.name: Eduardo R.
reviews.text: Authentic Salvadoran food that reminds me of home. The sopa de res on weekends is a must.

reviews.name: Maria T.
reviews.text: This is our go-to spot. Great food, huge portions, and the prices are so reasonable. You can feed a family for $30.

reviews.name: Jose G.
reviews.text: The tamales here are legendary. My mom says they're as good as hers, which is the highest compliment.

reviews.name: Sandra M.
reviews.text: La Esquina is a neighborhood treasure. Simple, honest food made by people who care. Don't miss it.

contact.mapEmbedQuery: La Esquina Restaurant 3301 Division St Los Angeles CA 90065

seo.title: La Esquina Restaurant | Salvadoran & Mexican Food in Cypress Park LA
seo.description: Authentic pupusas, tacos, tamales, and Salvadoran specialties on Division Street. 251 reviews. Open 9 AM to 7 PM daily.
